solutionFiles.content:
pwd
ls community-file-room
mkdir -p community-file-room/handoff
mkdir -p community-file-room/reports
mkdir -p community-file-room/archive
mkdir -p community-file-room/backup
ls community-file-room

echo "Community file room handoff" > handoff/README.txt
echo "Agenda, guest list, and venue notes prepared" >> handoff/README.txt
cat handoff/README.txt

Community file room handoff
Agenda, guest list, and venue notes prepared

solutionFiles.content:
mkdir -p handoff reports
mv inbox/agenda.txt handoff/agenda.txt
mv inbox/venue.txt handoff/venue.txt
mv inbox/guest-list.txt reports/guest-list.txt
ls handoff
ls reports

Community file room handoff
Agenda, guest list, and venue notes prepared

rm inbox/tmp-scratch.txt
